head.title: H2O.ai | Convergence of the World’s Best Predictive and Generative AI for Private, Protected Data

meta.name: description
meta.content: Only H2O.ai provides an end-to-end GenAI platform where you own every part of the stack. Built for airgapped, on-premises or cloud VPC deployments.

p.span: AI AGENTS & DIGITAL ASSISTANTS

a.alt: Learn more about H2O Enterprise h2oGPTe

span.p: h2oGPTe: Enterprise GenAI with multi-model support, cost controls, and app integrations

a.alt: Learn more about H2O LLM Studio

span.p: H2O LLM Studio: No-code training and tuning for efficient, enterprise-ready LLMs and SLMs

p.span: BUSINESS INSIGHTS & PREDICTIVE AI

a.alt: Learn more about H2O Driverless AI

span.p: H2O Driverless AI: Accelerate model development with automatic feature engineering and explainability

a.alt: Learn more about H2O Hydrogen Torch

span.p: H2O Hydrogen Torch: Train image, text, and time-series models with prebuilt templates
H2O Danube3: Lightweight, offline-capable small language models
H2OVL Mississippi: OCR and Document AI with open multimodal models

a.alt: Learn more about H2O LLM Studio

span.p: H2O LLM Studio: Train custom LLMs and SLMs without code
tabH2O: A foundation model for tabular data
Label Genie: Faster annotations with smart suggestions

a.alt: Learn more about H2O Feature Store

span.p: H2O Feature Store: Centralized and shareable feature repository
H2O-3: Distributed machine learning for Python, R, and Spark
H2O MLOps: Manage the full ML lifecycle from training to production

a.alt: Learn more about H2O GenAI App Store

span.p: H2O GenAI App Store: Prebuilt apps for industry-specific GenAI use cases
H2O Wave: Build custom AI apps with Python and minimal code

h1.span: Australia’s largest bank cuts fraud by

p.span: We trained 900 of our analysts to use H2O.ai. Every decision we make for our customers—and we make millions every day—we’re making those decisions 100% better using H2O.ai -
Andrew McMullan, Former Chief Data & Analytics Officer, Commonwealth Bank of Australia

div.class: row pb-5 pt-5 mt-5 mb-5 align-items-end h2o-gutters-60 black-divider-color

h1.span: AT&T + h2oGPTe transform call center operations, return

p.span: Last year, we returned 2X ROI in free cash flow on every dollar we spent on generative AI. That’s a one-year return. - Andy Markus, CDO, AT&T.
H2O.ai continues to innovate and define what’s next in AI. With their partnership, we’re moving faster, delivering more value, and co-creating new AI products.
Andy Markus, CDO, AT&T

div.class: row pb-5 pt-5 mt-5 mb-5 align-items-end h2o-gutters-60 black-divider-color

h1.span: NIH + h2oGPTe create 24/7 “business assistant” to support

p.span: By deploying H2O.ai’s h2oGPTe inside our air‑gapped environment, we delivered a secure Generative AI assistant that surfaces precise policy and procurement answers in seconds—freeing our team to concentrate on mission‑critical improvements instead of repeating FAQs.”
Director ONBS, NIH

div.h2: Active, global ecosystem of 2M+ data science users on H2O.ai open source.
In-house, on-the-ground KGM expertise in global hubs.
End-to-end GenAI platform built for air-gapped, on-premises or cloud VPC deployments.
Used by banks, telcos, and government agencies worldwide.
No data sharing. No model exfiltration.

Works with Your Apps
Together, they enable agents that go beyond language—able to forecast, reason, optimize, and take action. This convergence powers decision-making and automation across enterprise workflows.

p.span: Gartner MQ DSML
H2O.ai is recognized based on its completeness of vision and ability to execute.
AI AGENT

div.h2:
Create powerful AI agents to
automate work at scale

span.p: Create powerful domain-specific agents to automate work at scale on your private data.
Find answers. Generate responsive, situation-specific content you can trust.
H2O MRM and Eval Studio provide automated testing, human-calibrated evaluations, and real-time risk monitoring to ensure transparency—strengthening compliance, risk management, and user confidence.
H2O’s APIs make it easy to integrate agentic AI search and task agents into existing workflows via Google Drive, SharePoint, Slack, Teams, and more.

div.class: h2o-wrapper pt-md-5 pb-md-5 pt-lg-5 pb-lg-5 pt-xl-5 pb-xl-5
